modules.name: python3-requirements
build-commands: pip3 install --prefix=${FLATPAK_DEST} pyperclip openai pillow numpy pycairo httpx typing_extensions distlib sniffio jiter anyio idna certifi

modules.name: tablet2latex
build-commands: sh -c 'set -e; SP=$(python3 -c "import sysconfig; print(sysconfig.get_path(\"purelib\", vars={\"platbase\": \"${FLATPAK_DEST}\", \"base\": \"${FLATPAK_DEST}\"}))" ); mkdir -p "${SP}/tablet2latex" "${FLATPAK_DEST}/bin" "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/applications" "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/metainfo" "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps"; cp src/tablet2latex/*.py "${SP}/tablet2latex/"; install -Dm755 tablet2latex.py "${FLATPAK_DEST}/bin/tablet2latex"; install -Dm644 com.example.tablet2latex.desktop "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/applications/com.example.tablet2latex.desktop"; install -Dm644 com.example.tablet2latex.metainfo.xml "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/metainfo/com.example.tablet2latex.metainfo.xml"; install -Dm644 tablet2latex.svg "${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps/com.example.tablet2latex.svg"'
